brandStrengthRationale: No colors, fonts, or visual identity signals were detected on the current site. The only brand artifact present is a logo file reference and boilerplate welcome copy that could belong to any dental practice in any city.
evolutionSignal: rebuild — there is no existing visual brand to evolve. The site presents as an unconfigured or template-default state with no applied palette, no typography system, and no distinguishable aesthetic identity specific to a pediatric dental audience.
rationale: The current Pediatric Dental Specialists site has effectively zero brand presence: no color palette was detected, no typography signals were captured, and the copy is generic boilerplate. The practice name and Long Beach, CA location are the only differentiating data points available. The Brand Direction step is working with a blank slate and should build a pediatric-appropriate identity entirely from scratch, using only the practice name and specialty as anchors.
